This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Should use the third fallback position with enough space left
  assert_equals: Anchored element should be at the left of anchor expected 135 but got 335
[FAIL] Should use the second fallback position with enough space above
  assert_equals: Anchored element should be at the top of anchor expected 135 but got 335
Harness: the test ran to completion.
